name: Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Bake pie shell for 10 minutes and set aside.
3. Reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees.
4. Peel, boil and drain yams or sweet potatoes.
5. Mash the boiled yams or sweet potatoes and add the remaining ingredients (lemon juice, butter, milk, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, salt, ginger, brown sugar, allspice, white sugar, and brandy).
6. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are well combined.
7. Fill pie shell with the mixture and bake for 25 to 35 minutes or until the pie has puffed up and is firm in the middle.
8. Optionally, decorate the top of the pie with strips of dough before serving.
